# Vježba 2: Viskoznost i Površinska napetost

### Uvod: Što je zapravo viskoznost?

Prije rješavanja zadataka, važno je razumjeti da je viskoznost **unutarnje trenje** fluida. Kada se fluid giba, slojevi fluida se opiru međusobnom klizanju. 

Newtonov zakon viskoznosti glasi:
$$\tau = \mu \frac{dv}{dy}$$

*   $\tau$ [Pa] – tangencijalno naprezanje (sila trenja po jedinici površine)
*   $\mu$ [Pa·s] – dinamička viskoznost
*   $\frac{dv}{dy}$ [1/s] – gradijent brzine (promjena brzine po visini sloja)

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Osnove viskoznosti (Newtonov zakon) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-visc-basics">
    <style>
        #widget-visc-basics { max-width: 800px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }
        #widget-visc-basics .controls { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; background: #f8f9fa; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .canvas-wrapper { width: 100%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; }
        #widget-visc-basics canvas { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metrics { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; background: #34495e; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 15px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-item { text-align: center; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-label { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.8; display: block; text-transform: uppercase; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-value { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; }
    </style>

    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Vizualizacija Newtonovog zakona viskoznosti</h3></div>
    
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Brzina gornje ploče (v): <span id="v-val">1.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v-slider" min="0.1" max="5.0" value="1.0" step="0.1" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Viskoznost (μ): <span id="mu-val">0.1</span> Pa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="mu-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" value="0.1" step="0.01" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Zračnost (δ): <span id="h-slider-val">10</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider" min="2" max="30" value="10" step="1" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="visc-canvas" width="800" height="250"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Gradijent brzine (dv/dy)</span><span class="metric-value" id="grad-out">100</span> s⁻¹</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Smicajno naprezanje (τ)</span><span class="metric-value" id="tau-out">10.0</span> Pa</div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('visc-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider');
        const muSl = document.getElementById('mu-slider');
        const hSl = document.getElementById('h-slider');

        let particles = [];
        for(let i=0; i<100; i++) {
            particles.push({
                x: Math.random() * 800,
                y: Math.random()
            });
        }

        function draw() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const mu = parseFloat(muSl.value);
            const h_mm = parseFloat(hSl.value);
            const h_px = h_mm * 5; 
            
            const dv_dy = v / (h_mm / 1000);
            const tau = mu * dv_dy;

            document.getElementById('v-val').textContent = v.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('mu-val').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('h-slider-val').textContent = h_mm;
            document.getElementById('grad-out').textContent = Math.round(dv_dy);
            document.getElementById('tau-out').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
            const topY = centerY - h_px/2;
            const botY = centerY + h_px/2;

            // Fluid
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(52, 152, 219, ${0.1 + mu * 0.5})`;
            ctx.fillRect(0, topY, canvas.width, h_px);

            // Donja ploča (fiksna) s uzorkom
            ctx.fillStyle = '#95a5a6';
            ctx.fillRect(0, botY, canvas.width, 20);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#7f8c8d'; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for(let x=0; x<800; x+=10) {
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, botY+20); ctx.lineTo(x+10, botY); ctx.stroke();
            }

            // Gornja ploča (pomična)
            const offset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * v * 100) % 40;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#34495e';
            ctx.fillRect(0, topY - 20, canvas.width, 20);
            
            // Uzorak na gornjoj ploči koji se miče
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2c3e50'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            for(let x = -40; x < 840; x += 40) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x + offset, topY - 20);
                ctx.lineTo(x + offset + 10, topY);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // Particles
            particles.forEach(p => {
                const u = v * (1 - p.y); 
                p.x += u * 2;
                if(p.x > 800) p.x = 0;
                
                const py = topY + p.y * h_px;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#2980b9';
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            });

            // Velocity Profile
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#e67e22'; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(100, botY); ctx.lineTo(100 + v*40, topY); ctx.stroke();

            for(let i=0; i<=5; i++) {
                const f = i/5;
                const y = botY - f*h_px;
                const arrowL = f * v * 40;
                if(arrowL > 2) {
                    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(100, y); ctx.lineTo(100 + arrowL, y);
                    ctx.lineTo(100 + arrowL - 5, y - 3); ctx.moveTo(100+arrowL, y); ctx.lineTo(100 + arrowL - 5, y + 3);
                    ctx.stroke();
                }
            }
            
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e67e22'; ctx.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
            ctx.fillText('Profil u(y)', 80, botY + 35);

            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }
        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 10: Okretni moment na krnjem stošcu (Izvod)

**Tekst zadatka:** 
10. Ulje dinamičke viskoznosti $\mu$ ispunjava zračnost $\delta$. Potrebno je odrediti izraz za okretni moment potreban za rotaciju krnjeg stošca konstantnom kutnom brzinom. Prilikom proračuna zanemariti utjecaj gornjeg i donjeg horizontalnog dijela krnjeg stošca.

**Zadano:** 
* $\mu, \delta, \omega = \text{konst.}, \alpha, a, b, y$

**Odrediti:** 
* $T = ?$

**Rješenje:**
1. **Geometrija:** Radijus na visini $y$ je $r = y \cdot \tan\alpha$. Element površine plašta je $dA = 2\pi r \cdot ds = 2\pi (y \tan\alpha) \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha}$.
2. **Newtonov zakon:** Tangencijalno naprezanje je $\tau = \mu \frac{v}{\delta} = \mu \frac{\omega r}{\delta} = \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta}$.
3. **Moment sile:** Elementarni moment iznosi $dT = r \cdot \tau \cdot dA = (y \tan\alpha) \cdot \left( \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta} \right) \cdot \left( 2\pi y \tan\alpha \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha} \right)$.
4. **Integracija:** Ukupni moment dobivamo integracijom po visini od $a$ do $a+b$:
$$T = \int_a^{a+b} \frac{2\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{\delta \cos\alpha} y^3 dy = \mathbf{\frac{\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{2 \delta \cos\alpha} [(a+b)^4 - a^4]}$$

```{=html}
<!-- GEOMETRIJSKI WIDGET ZA ZADATAK 10 - FINALNI FIX -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z10-fixed" style="max-width: 800px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 20px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #2d3748; margin-bottom: 20px;">Šematski prikaz geometrije (Zadatak 10)</h4>
    <canvas id="canvas-z10-final" width="800" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: auto; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #eee;"></canvas>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-final');
        if (!canvas) return;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        function draw() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = canvas.width / 2;
            const cy = 400;
            const a = 80, b = 200, alpha = 25 * Math.PI / 180;
            
            // Centralna os
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.strokeStyle = "#a0aec0";
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx, cy + 20); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            // Podloga
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - 300, cy); ctx.lineTo(cx + 300, cy); ctx.stroke();

            // Krnji stožac
            const r1 = a * Math.tan(alpha);
            const r2 = (a+b) * Math.tan(alpha);
            const y1 = cy - a;
            const y2 = cy - (a+b);

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - r1, y1); ctx.lineTo(cx + r1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + r2, y2); ctx.lineTo(cx - r2, y2);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.1)"; ctx.fill();
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2c5282"; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.stroke();

            // Element dA
            const y_el = a + b * 0.6;
            const r_el = y_el * Math.tan(alpha);
            const py_el = cy - y_el;
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(229, 62, 62, 0.5)";
            ctx.fillRect(cx - r_el, py_el - 4, 2 * r_el, 8);
            
            // Oznake
            ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.font = "bold 16px Arial";
            
            // Visine
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#718096"; ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + 260, cy); ctx.lineTo(cx + 260, y1); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText("a", cx + 270, cy - a/2);
            
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + 260, y1); ctx.lineTo(cx + 260, y2); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText("b", cx + 270, cy - a - b/2);

            // Kut
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, 60, -Math.PI/2, -Math.PI/2 + alpha);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText("α", cx + 15, cy - 70);

            // Brzina omega
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(cx, 60, 40, 15, 0, 0, Math.PI * 1.5);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText("ω", cx + 45, 65);
        }
        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 11: Proračun snage rotacije

**Tekst zadatka:** 
11. Krnji stožac rotira konstantnom kutnom brzinom od $200 \text{ [rad/s]}$ unutar spremnika napunjenog uljem SAE 10W, pri čemu temperatura iznosi $20 \text{ [°C]}$, dinamička viskoznost ulja za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi $0,1 \text{ [Pa s]}$, sustav i dimenzije prikazani na slici. Ukoliko pretpostavimo konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja sa svih strana krnjeg stošca od $1,2 \text{ [mm]}$, potrebno je odrediti snagu potrebnu za održavanje spomenute kutne brzine. Također odrediti i smanjenje potrebne snage kada se temperatura ulja povisi na $80 \text{ [°C]}$, pri čemu dinamička viskoznost ulja iznosi $0,0078 \text{ [Pa s]}$.

**Zadano:** 
* $D=0,12\text{ m}, L=0,12\text{ m}, d=0,04\text{ m}, \omega=200\text{ rad/s}, \delta=0,0012\text{ m}$
* $t_1=20^\circ\text{C}, \mu_{20}=0,1\text{ Pa s}, t_2=80^\circ\text{C}, \mu_{80}=0,0078\text{ Pa s}$

**Odrediti:** 
* $P_{20}=?, \Delta P_{20-80}=?$

**Rješenje:**
1. **Snaga na bazama:** $P_{baze} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 + d^4)}{32 \delta} = \mathbf{68,7 \text{ W}}$.
2. **Snaga na plaštu:** $\tan\alpha = \frac{D-d}{2L} = 0,33 \implies \alpha = 18,4^\circ$.
   $P_{plašt} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 - d^4)}{32 \delta \sin\alpha} = \mathbf{211,9 \text{ W}}$.
3. **Ukupna snaga (20 °C):** $P_{tot} = \mathbf{280,6 \text{ W}}$.
4. **Pad snage na 80 °C:** $P_{80} = P_{20} \cdot \frac{0,0078}{0,1} = \mathbf{21,9 \text{ W}}$ (Smanjenje za 92,2%).

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 11: Napredna fizika rotacije i smicanja -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z11-v6" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);">
    <style>
        .z11-v6-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .z11-v6-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .control-panel-v6 { background: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .result-badge { background: #2d3748; color: #fff; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; margin-top: 15px; text-align: center; }
        .canvas-card { position: relative; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 15px; overflow: hidden; }
        .label-3d { position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 15px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: bold; color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:800;">⚙️ Simulator rotacijskog trenja u sloju ulja</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Analiza utjecaja geometrije i viskoznosti na snagu gubitaka</p>
    </div>

    <div class="z11-v6-grid">
        <div class="control-panel-v6">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#4a5568;">Kutna brzina (ω): <span id="w-val-v6" style="color:#3182ce;">200</span> rad/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="w-slider-v6" min="0" max="600" step="10" value="200" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#4a5568;">Zračnost (δ): <span id="d-val-v6" style="color:#e53e3e;">1.2</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="d-slider-v6" min="0.5" max="5.0" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#4a5568;">Viskoznost (μ): <span id="mu-val-v6" style="color:#2f855a;">0.10</span> Pa·s</label>
                <input type="range" id="mu-slider-v6" min="0.01" max="0.5" step="0.01" value="0.1" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="result-badge">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Ukupna snaga trenja</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900;"><span id="p-res-v6">0.0</span> W</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.8rem; margin-top:5px;">Sila smicanja τ ∝ 1/δ</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:15px;">
            <div class="canvas-card" style="height:220px;">
                <span class="label-3d">GLAVNI PRIKAZ (GEOMETRIJA)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-v6-main" width="500" height="220" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="canvas-card" style="height:180px; border-color:#bee3f8;">
                <span class="label-3d" style="color:#3182ce;">DETALJNI PROFIL BRZINE u(y)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-v6-zoom" width="500" height="180" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cMain = document.getElementById('canvas-v6-main');
        const cZoom = document.getElementById('canvas-v6-zoom');
        const ctxM = cMain.getContext('2d');
        const ctxZ = cZoom.getContext('2d');

        const wSl = document.getElementById('w-slider-v6');
        const dSl = document.getElementById('d-slider-v6');
        const muSl = document.getElementById('mu-slider-v6');

        let rotAngle = 0;

        function update() {
            const w = parseFloat(wSl.value);
            const delta_mm = parseFloat(dSl.value);
            const mu = parseFloat(muSl.value);
            const delta = delta_mm / 1000;

            const R1 = 0.02, R2 = 0.06, L = 0.12;
            const alpha = Math.atan((R2-R1)/L);

            // Snaga: P = PI * mu * w^2 * (R2^4 - R1^4) / (2 * delta * sin(alpha))
            const Power = (Math.PI * mu * w*w * (Math.pow(R2,4)-Math.pow(R1,4))) / (2 * delta * Math.sin(alpha));

            document.getElementById('w-val-v6').textContent = w;
            document.getElementById('d-val-v6').textContent = delta_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('mu-val-v6').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('p-res-v6').textContent = Power.toFixed(1);

            draw(w, delta_mm, mu);
        }

        function draw(w, delta_mm, mu) {
            ctxM.clearRect(0,0,cMain.width, cMain.height);
            ctxZ.clearRect(0,0,cZoom.width, cZoom.height);
            rotAngle += w * 0.0005;

            const cx = 250, cy = 110;
            const scale = 1200; // Geometry scale

            // --- 1. MAIN CANVAS ---
            // Oil (Ambient)
            ctxM.fillStyle = `rgba(246, 173, 85, ${0.1 + mu * 0.5})`;
            ctxM.beginPath();
            ctxM.moveTo(cx - 100, cy + 80); ctxM.lineTo(cx + 100, cy + 80);
            ctxM.lineTo(cx + 100, cy - 80); ctxM.lineTo(cx - 100, cy - 80);
            ctxM.fill();

            // Rotating Cone
            const grad = ctxM.createLinearGradient(cx-80, 0, cx+80, 0);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#2d3748'); grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#718096'); grad.addColorStop(1, '#2d3748');
            ctxM.fillStyle = grad;
            ctxM.beginPath();
            ctxM.moveTo(cx-30, cy+60); ctxM.lineTo(cx+30, cy+60);
            ctxM.lineTo(cx+70, cy-60); ctxM.lineTo(cx-70, cy-60);
            ctxM.closePath();
            ctxM.fill(); ctxM.strokeStyle="#1a202c"; ctxM.lineWidth=2; ctxM.stroke();

            // Shaft
            ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.moveTo(cx, cy-90); ctxM.lineTo(cx, cy+60); ctxM.stroke();
            ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.ellipse(cx, cy-85, 30, 8, 0, rotAngle, rotAngle + Math.PI*1.5); ctxM.stroke();

            // --- 2. ZOOM CANVAS (THE PHYSICS) ---
            const zy = 90, zw = 300, zx = 100;
            const d_px = delta_mm * 15; // Scaled gap

            // Walls
            ctxZ.fillStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctxZ.fillRect(zx + d_px, 20, 20, 140); // Fixed
            ctxZ.fillStyle = "#4a5568"; ctxZ.fillRect(zx - 15, 20, 15, 140); // Moving

            // Velocity Profile
            const v_max = Math.min(150, w * 0.4);
            ctxZ.beginPath();
            ctxZ.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctxZ.lineWidth = 3;
            ctxZ.moveTo(zx, zy);
            ctxZ.lineTo(zx + v_max, zy);
            ctxZ.stroke();

            // Profile Arrows
            for(let i=0; i<10; i++) {
                const stepX = (i/9) * d_px;
                const localV = v_max * (1 - i/9);
                if(localV > 2) {
                    ctxZ.beginPath(); ctxZ.strokeStyle = `rgba(229, 62, 62, ${1 - i/12})`;
                    ctxZ.moveTo(zx + stepX, zy - 40);
                    ctxZ.lineTo(zx + stepX + localV, zy - 40);
                    ctxZ.stroke();
                }
            }

            // Shear deforming grid
            ctxZ.setLineDash([2, 2]); ctxZ.strokeStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)";
            const animOffset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * w * 0.2) % 40;
            for(let x = zx; x < zx + d_px; x += 10) {
                ctxZ.beginPath();
                ctxZ.moveTo(x + (1 - (x-zx)/d_px)*animOffset, 40);
                ctxZ.lineTo(x, 140);
                ctxZ.stroke();
            }
            ctxZ.setLineDash([]);

            // Labels
            ctxZ.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctxZ.font = "bold 11px Arial";
            ctxZ.fillText("POVRŠINA STOŠCA", zx - 80, 15);
            ctxZ.fillText("FIKSNO KUĆIŠTE", zx + d_px + 5, 15);
            ctxZ.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
            ctxZ.fillText(`v = ${(w*0.06).toFixed(1)} m/s`, zx + v_max + 5, zy + 4);
        }

        wSl.oninput = dSl.oninput = muSl.oninput = update;
        function animate() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(animate); }
        animate();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```
***

### Zadatak 12: Kapilarni porast (Voda vs Živa)

**Tekst zadatka:** 
12. Pri temperaturi 60[°C] površinska napetost žive iznosi 0,47 [N/m], dok je površinska napetost vode 0,0662 [N/m]. Potrebno je odrediti promjene kapilarnog porasta visine dotičnih tekućina kada se nalaze u kontaktu sa zrakom unutar staklene cijevi polumjera 0,3 [mm]. Kut kvašenja za živu iznosi 130°, dok za vodu iznosi 0°. Gustoća žive pri temperaturi 60[°C] iznosi 13,48 [g/cm³] , dok gustoća vode za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi 0,9837 [g/cm³] (Kraut).

**Zadano:**
* $t_1 = 60[°C], \sigma_{Hg} = 0,47 \, [N/m], \sigma_v = 0,0662 \, [N/m], R_c = 0,0003 \, [m]$
* $\theta_{Hg} = 130°, \theta_v = 0°, \rho_{Hg60} = 13480 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_{v60} = 983,7 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
Promjene kapilarnog porasta visina: $h_v = ?, h_{Hg} = ?$

**Rješenje:** 
* **Voda:** $h_v = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0662 \cdot \cos 0°}{983,7 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{45,7 \, mm}$
* **Živa:** $h_{Hg} = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,47 \cdot \cos 130°}{13480 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{-15,2 \, mm}$ (kapilarna depresija)

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 12: Interaktivna kapilarnost -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z12-v4" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">🧪 Eksperiment: Kapilarni uspon i depresija</h3></div>
    
    <div class="controls" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap:15px; margin:20px 0; background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label style="font-weight:600;">Polumjer cijevi (R): <span id="r-val-z12">0.3</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="r-slider-z12" min="0.1" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0.3" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label style="font-weight:600;">Tekućina:</label>
            <select id="fluid-select-z12" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <option value="water">Voda (Hidrofilna)</option>
                <option value="mercury">Živa (Hidrofobna)</option>
            </select>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px; height:400px; overflow:hidden;">
        <canvas id="canvas-z12-v4" width="800" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        
        <div id="z12-metrics" style="position:absolute; bottom:20px; right:20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding:15px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #3182ce; box-shadow:0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#64748b; font-weight:bold;">IZRAČUNATA VISINA (h)</div>
            <div style="font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:bold; color:#2c5282;"><span id="h-res-z12">45.7</span> mm</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z12-v4');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const rSl = document.getElementById('r-slider-z12');
        const fSel = document.getElementById('fluid-select-z12');

        function draw() {
            const R_mm = parseFloat(rSl.value);
            const type = fSel.value;
            const R = R_mm / 1000;
            
            let sigma, rho, theta, color, bgColor;
            if(type === 'water') {
                sigma = 0.0662; rho = 983.7; theta = 0; 
                color = "#3182ce"; bgColor = "#ebf8ff";
            } else {
                sigma = 0.47; rho = 13480; theta = 130 * Math.PI / 180;
                color = "#718096"; bgColor = "#f1f5f9";
            }

            const h = (2 * sigma * Math.cos(theta)) / (rho * 9.81 * R);
            document.getElementById('r-val-z12').textContent = R_mm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('h-res-z12').textContent = (h * 1000).toFixed(1);

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 400, baseLine = 300;
            const tubeW = R_mm * 100; // scaling for visibility
            const h_px = h * 2000; // scaling height

            // Draw Tank
            ctx.fillStyle = bgColor;
            ctx.fillRect(cx-200, baseLine, 400, 100);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(cx-200, baseLine, 400, 100);

            // Draw Tube
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx - tubeW/2, baseLine + 80);
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2, baseLine + 80);
            ctx.stroke();

            // Draw Liquid in Tank
            ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.6;
            ctx.fillRect(cx-200, baseLine, 200 - tubeW/2, 100);
            ctx.fillRect(cx + tubeW/2, baseLine, 200 - tubeW/2, 100);

            // Draw Liquid in Tube (with meniscus)
            ctx.beginPath();
            const topY = baseLine - h_px;
            ctx.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2, baseLine + 80);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - tubeW/2, topY);
            
            // Meniskus curve
            const meniscusH = type === 'water' ? -tubeW/4 : tubeW/4;
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, topY + meniscusH, cx + tubeW/2, topY);
            
            ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2, baseLine + 80);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;

            // Dimension line for h
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 20, baseLine); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 100, baseLine); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 20, topY); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 100, topY); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            
            // Arrow for h
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 80, baseLine); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 80, topY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText("h", cx + tubeW/2 + 85, (baseLine + topY)/2);

            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }
        draw();
        rSl.oninput = fSel.onchange = draw;
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 13

13. Kuglolika kap vode temperature $25\text{ [°C]}$ u dodiru sa zrakom ima promjer $0,5\text{ mm}$. Tlak unutar kapi veći je od atmosferskog tlaka za $565\text{ [Pa]}$. Potrebno je odrediti vrijednost površinske napetosti.

**Zadano:** $t_v=25^\circ\text{C}, \Delta p=565\text{ Pa}, D_k=0,0005\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $\sigma=?$

**Rješenje:**
$\Delta p = \frac{4\sigma}{D} \implies \sigma = \frac{\Delta p \cdot D}{4} = \frac{565 \cdot 0,0005}{4} = \mathbf{0,0706 \text{ N/m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 13: Tlak unutar kapljice -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-13">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Tlak unutar kapljice (Young-Laplace)</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Promjer kapljice D: <span id="val-d13">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-d13" min="0.1" max="5.0" value="2.0" step="0.1">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Površinska napetost σ: <span id="val-sig13">0.073</span> N/m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-sig13" min="0.01" max="0.1" value="0.073" step="0.001">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper" style="background: white;">
        <div id="drop-container" style="position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 100%;">
            <div id="water-drop" style="border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #a9dfbf, #2ecc71); transition: all 0.2s ease-out; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);">
                <div id="drop-text" style="color: white; font-weight: bold; text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px black;"></div>
            </div>
            <div id="arrows-layer" style="position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">NADTLAK Δp</span><span id="out-dp13">0</span> Pa</div>
    </div>

    <p class="info-text">Young-Laplace: Δp = 4σ/D. Manje kapljice imaju drastično veći unutarnji tlak. Boja kapljice postaje intenzivnija s tlakom.</p>

    <script>
        (function() {
            const slD = document.getElementById('slider-d13');
            const slS = document.getElementById('slider-sig13');
            const drop = document.getElementById('water-drop');
            const arrows = document.getElementById('arrows-layer');
            const outDp = document.getElementById('out-dp13');

            function update() {
                const D_mm = parseFloat(slD.value);
                const sig = parseFloat(slS.value);
                const D = D_mm / 1000;
                const dp = (4 * sig) / D;

                document.getElementById('val-d13').textContent = D_mm.toFixed(1);
                document.getElementById('val-sig13').textContent = sig.toFixed(3);
                outDp.textContent = Math.round(dp);

                const sizePx = D_mm * 50;
                drop.style.width = `${sizePx}px`;
                drop.style.height = `${sizePx}px`;

                const intensity = Math.min(1, dp / 2000);
                const r = Math.round(46 + intensity * (231 - 46));
                const g = Math.round(204 - intensity * 150);
                const b = Math.round(113 - intensity * 50);
                drop.style.background = `radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgb(${r+40},${g+40},${b+40}), rgb(${r},${g},${b}))`;

                arrows.innerHTML = '';
                const numArrows = 8;
                const arrowLen = 10 + sig * 200;
                const cx = arrows.offsetWidth / 2;
                const cy = arrows.offsetHeight / 2;
                const radius = sizePx / 2;

                for(let i=0; i<numArrows; i++) {
                    const angle = (i / numArrows) * 2 * Math.PI;
                    const el = document.createElement('div');
                    el.style.position = 'absolute';
                    el.style.left = `${cx + Math.cos(angle)*radius}px`;
                    el.style.top = `${cy + Math.sin(angle)*radius}px`;
                    el.style.width = `${arrowLen}px`;
                    el.style.height = '2px';
                    el.style.background = '#333';
                    el.style.transformOrigin = '0 50%';
                    el.style.transform = `rotate(${angle * 180 / Math.PI + 180}deg)`;
                    
                    const head = document.createElement('div');
                    head.style.position = 'absolute';
                    head.style.right = '-4px';
                    head.style.top = '-3px';
                    head.style.borderLeft = '6px solid #333';
                    head.style.borderTop = '4px solid transparent';
                    head.style.borderBottom = '4px solid transparent';
                    el.appendChild(head);
                    arrows.appendChild(el);
                }
            }
            slD.addEventListener('input', update);
            slS.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 14

14. Staklena cijev uronjena je u živu kao što je prikazano na slici. Temperatura iznosi $20\text{ [°C]}$. Potrebno je odrediti silu na staklenu cijev uslijed utjecaja površinske napetosti, površinska napetost žive za navedenu temperaturu iznosi $0,514 \text{ [N/m]}$.

**Zadano:** $t=20^\circ\text{C}, \sigma_{Hg-z}=0,514\text{ N/m}, d_o=35\text{ mm}=0,035\text{ m}, d_i=25\text{ mm}=0,025\text{ m}, \theta_{Hg}=180-130=50^\circ$
**Odrediti:** $F_{\sigma, s}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$F_\sigma = \sigma \cdot \pi \cdot (d_o + d_i) \cdot \cos(50^\circ) = 0,514 \cdot \pi \cdot (0,035 + 0,025) \cdot 0,642 = \mathbf{0,0623 \text{ N}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 14: Sila površinske napetosti na prstenastom presjeku -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z14-v5" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <style>
        .z14-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .z14-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .force-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: bold; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px; }
        .up-force { background: #f0fff4; color: #27ae60; }
        .down-force { background: #fff5f5; color: #e53e3e; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">🔬 Analiza sila: Površinska napetost na staklenoj cijevi</h3></div>

    <div class="z14-grid" style="margin-top:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600;">Vanjski promjer (do): <span id="do-val-z14">35</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="do-slider-z14" min="30" max="60" value="35" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600;">Unutarnji promjer (di): <span id="di-val-z14">25</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="di-slider-z14" min="10" max="28" value="25" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600;">Kut kvašenja (θ): <span id="theta-val-z14">50</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="theta-slider-z14" min="0" max="180" value="50" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <button class="btn" id="btn-hg-z14" style="width:100%; margin-top:20px; background:#718096;">Postavi parametre Žive (θ=130°)</button>
            <button class="btn" id="btn-w-z14" style="width:100%; margin-top:10px; background:#3182ce;">Postavi parametre Vode (θ=0°)</button>

            <div style="margin-top:20px; padding:15px; background:#fff; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b; font-weight:bold;">UKUPNA SILA (Fz):</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:800; color:#2d3748;"><span id="fz-res-z14">0.0623</span> N</div>
                <div id="dir-indicator-z14" class="force-label">...</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="visual-panel" style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden;">
            <canvas id="canvas-z14-v5" width="450" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z14-v5');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const doSl = document.getElementById('do-slider-z14');
        const diSl = document.getElementById('di-slider-z14');
        const thSl = document.getElementById('theta-slider-z14');
        const dirInd = document.getElementById('dir-indicator-z14');

        function update() {
            const do_mm = parseFloat(doSl.value);
            const di_mm = parseFloat(diSl.value);
            const theta_deg = parseFloat(thSl.value);
            const theta = theta_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            const sigma = (theta_deg > 90) ? 0.514 : 0.073; // Simple toggle between Hg and H2O

            document.getElementById('do-val-z14').textContent = do_mm;
            document.getElementById('di-val-z14').textContent = di_mm;
            document.getElementById('theta-val-z14').textContent = theta_deg;

            // F = sigma * PI * (do + di) * cos(theta)
            const Fz = sigma * Math.PI * (do_mm + di_mm) / 1000 * Math.cos(theta);
            document.getElementById('fz-res-z14').textContent = Math.abs(Fz).toFixed(4);

            if(Math.abs(Math.cos(theta)) < 0.01) {
                dirInd.textContent = "NEMA VERTIKALNE SILE";
                dirInd.className = "force-label";
            } else if(Fz > 0) {
                dirInd.textContent = "SMJER: GORE (Privlačenje)";
                dirInd.className = "force-label up-force";
            } else {
                dirInd.textContent = "SMJER: DOLJE (Odbijanje)";
                dirInd.className = "force-label down-force";
            }

            draw(do_mm, di_mm, theta, theta_deg > 90, Fz);
        }

        function draw(do_mm, di_mm, theta, isHg, Fz) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 225, cy = 200;
            const scale = 4;
            const r_out = (do_mm/2) * scale;
            const r_in = (di_mm/2) * scale;

            // Water surface
            const liqY = 250;
            ctx.fillStyle = isHg ? "#cbd5e0" : "#ebf8ff";
            ctx.fillRect(0, liqY, canvas.width, 150);

            // Draw Tube Cross-section (Glass)
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)";
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#a0aec0"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;

            // Left Wall
            ctx.fillRect(cx - r_out, 50, r_out - r_in, 250);
            ctx.strokeRect(cx - r_out, 50, r_out - r_in, 250);

            // Right Wall
            ctx.fillRect(cx + r_in, 50, r_out - r_in, 250);
            ctx.strokeRect(cx + r_in, 50, r_out - r_in, 250);

            // Draw Meniscus
            const meniscusH = -Math.cos(theta) * 20;
            ctx.fillStyle = isHg ? "#718096" : "#3182ce";
            ctx.beginPath();

            // Outer Meniscus Left
            ctx.moveTo(cx - r_out - 40, liqY);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx - r_out - 5, liqY, cx - r_out, liqY + meniscusH);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - r_out, liqY + 150);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - r_out - 40, liqY + 150);
            ctx.fill();

            // Inner Meniscus
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - r_in, liqY + meniscusH);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, liqY + meniscusH + (isHg?5:-5), cx + r_in, liqY + meniscusH);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + r_in, liqY + 150);
            ctx.lineTo(cx - r_in, liqY + 150);
            ctx.fill();

            // Outer Meniscus Right
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx + r_out + 40, liqY);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx + r_out + 5, liqY, cx + r_out, liqY + meniscusH);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + r_out, liqY + 150);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + r_out + 40, liqY + 150);
            ctx.fill();

            // Force Vectors (Arrows)
            const arrowDir = Fz > 0 ? -1 : 1;
            const arrowColor = Fz > 0 ? "#27ae60" : "#e53e3e";
            ctx.strokeStyle = arrowColor; ctx.lineWidth = 2;

            const points = [cx - r_out, cx - r_in, cx + r_in, cx + r_out];
            points.forEach(x => {
                if(Math.abs(Fz) > 0.001) {
                    drawArrow(x, liqY + meniscusH, x, liqY + meniscusH + arrowDir * 40, arrowColor);
                }
            });

            // 3D Ring View (Top right corner)
            const rx = 350, ry = 80;
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(rx, ry, 40, 15, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); // Outer
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(rx, ry, 25, 10, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); // Inner

            // Highlight contact lines where sigma acts
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#38b2ac"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(rx, ry, 40, 15, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(rx, ry, 25, 10, 0, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.font = "bold 9px Arial"; ctx.fillStyle = "#38b2ac";
            ctx.fillText("KONTAKTNE LINIJE", rx - 40, ry + 30);
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
            const headlen = 6; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
            ctx.fill();
        }

        doSl.oninput = diSl.oninput = thSl.oninput = update;
        document.getElementById('btn-hg-z14').onclick = () => { thSl.value = 130; update(); };
        document.getElementById('btn-w-z14').onclick = () => { thSl.value = 0; update(); };

        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 15

15. Potrebno je odrediti maksimalan promjer čelične i aluminijske kuglice koje mogu plutati na vodi zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, pri čemu temperatura vode iznosi $20\text{ [°C]}$. Gustoća čelika iznosi $7800 \text{ [kg/m³]}$, dok je gustoća aluminija $2700 \text{ [kg/m³]}$. Površinska napetost vode za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi $0,073 \text{ [N/m]}$.

**Zadano:** $t_v=20^\circ\text{C}, \rho_c=7800\text{ kg/m}^3, \rho_{Al}=2700\text{ kg/m}^3, \sigma_{v20}=0,073\text{ N/m}$
**Odrediti:** $d_{max, c}=?, d_{max, Al}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$D_{max} = \sqrt{\frac{6\sigma}{\rho g}}$
* **Čelik:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{7800 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ mm}}$
* **Aluminij:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{2700 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{4,1 \text{ mm}}$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 15: Plutajuća kuglica (Napredni simulator) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z15-v4" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">⛵ Fizika plutanja: Površinska napetost vs. Težina</h3></div>
    
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap:20px; margin-top:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer kuglice (d): <span id="d-val-z15">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="d-slider-z15" min="0.5" max="6.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width:100%;">
            
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:8px;">Materijal:</label>
            <select id="mat-select-z15" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <option value="7800">Čelik (7800 kg/m³)</option>
                <option value="2700" selected>Aluminij (2700 kg/m³)</option>
                <option value="1200">Plastika (1200 kg/m³)</option>
            </select>

            <div style="margin-top:20px; padding:12px; background:#fff; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#64748b; font-weight:bold;">BALANS SILA:</div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-top:5px;">
                    <span style="color:#e53e3e;">Težina (G)</span>
                    <span id="fg-val-z15">...</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
                    <span style="color:#27ae60;">Napetost (Fσ)</span>
                    <span id="fs-val-z15">...</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="visual-panel" style="position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px; height:350px; overflow:hidden;">
            <canvas id="canvas-z15-v4" width="500" height="350" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="status-z15" style="position:absolute; top:15px; right:15px; font-weight:bold; padding:5px 12px; border-radius:20px;">PLUTA</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z15-v4');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const dSl = document.getElementById('d-slider-z15');
        const mSel = document.getElementById('mat-select-z15');
        const statusEl = document.getElementById('status-z15');

        function draw() {
            const d_mm = parseFloat(dSl.value);
            const rho = parseFloat(mSel.value);
            const d = d_mm / 1000;
            const sigma = 0.073; const g = 9.81;

            const Fg = rho * (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(d/2, 3) * g;
            const Fs_max = Math.PI * d * sigma;
            const isFloating = Fg <= Fs_max;

            document.getElementById('d-val-z15').textContent = d_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('fg-val-z15').textContent = (Fg*1e6).toFixed(1) + " µN";
            document.getElementById('fs-val-z15').textContent = (Fs_max*1e6).toFixed(1) + " µN";

            statusEl.textContent = isFloating ? "PLUTA ✓" : "TONE ✗";
            statusEl.style.backgroundColor = isFloating ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5";
            statusEl.style.color = isFloating ? "#27ae60" : "#e53e3e";

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 250, cy = 150;
            const r_px = d_mm * 15;

            // Water surface
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            if(isFloating) {
                const dip = (Fg / Fs_max) * r_px * 0.8;
                ctx.moveTo(0, cy);
                ctx.bezierCurveTo(cx - r_px*2, cy, cx - r_px, cy + dip, cx, cy + dip);
                ctx.bezierCurveTo(cx + r_px, cy + dip, cx + r_px*2, cy, canvas.width, cy);
                ctx.stroke();
                
                // Ball
                ctx.fillStyle = "#94a3b8";
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy + dip - r_px*0.7, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                
                // Forces
                drawArrow(cx, cy + dip - r_px*0.7, cx, cy + dip - r_px*0.7 + 50, "#e53e3e", "G");
                drawArrow(cx - r_px, cy + dip/2, cx - r_px, cy + dip/2 - 40, "#27ae60", "Fσ");
                drawArrow(cx + r_px, cy + dip/2, cx + r_px, cy + dip/2 - 40, "#27ae60", "Fσ");
            } else {
                ctx.moveTo(0, cy); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, cy); ctx.stroke();
                const sinkY = cy + 100;
                ctx.fillStyle = "#94a3b8";
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, sinkY, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                drawArrow(cx, sinkY, cx, sinkY + 60, "#e53e3e", "G");
            }
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
            const headlen = 8; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial"; ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 10, y2);
        }

        draw();
        dSl.oninput = mSel.onchange = draw;
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 16

16. Staklena cijev na slici koristi se za mjerenje pretlaka u spremniku vode $p_1$. Staklena cijev je promjera $1\text{ [mm]}$, temperatura vode iznosi $30\text{ [°C]}$. Potrebno je odrediti otklon očitanja zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, te odrediti pravu visinu vode u staklenoj cijevi. Površinska napetost vode pri temperaturi $30\text{ [°C]}$ iznosi $7,12 \cdot 10^{-2}\text{ [N/m]}$, gustoća vode iznosi $996\text{ [kg/m³]}$, a kut kvašenja za vodu iznosi $0^\circ$.

**Zadano:** $t_v=30^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,001\text{ m}, \sigma_{v30}=0,0712\text{ N/m}, \rho_{v30}=996\text{ kg/m}^3, \theta=0^\circ, H=0,17\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $h=?, H_0=?$

**Rješenje:**
1. Kapilarni uspon: $h = \frac{2\sigma}{\rho g R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0712}{996 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0005} = 29 \text{ mm}$.
2. Prava visina: $H_o = 170 - 29 = \mathbf{141 \text{ mm}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 16/17: Kapilarna greška -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-16">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Kapilarna greška u manometru</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Promjer cijevi dc: <span id="val-dc16">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-dc16" min="0.5" max="5.0" value="2.0" step="0.1">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Gustoća ρ: <span id="val-rho16">1000</span> kg/m³</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-rho16" min="700" max="1400" value="1000" step="50">
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">KAPILARNI POMAK h</span><span id="out-h16">0.00</span> mm</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">RELATIVNA GREŠKA (na 10cm)</span><span id="out-err16">0.00</span> %</div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <svg id="svg-16" width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 400 300">
            <rect x="50" y="150" width="150" height="100" fill="#d6eaf8" stroke="#3498db"/>
            <rect x="250" y="50" width="30" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#333" id="tube-16"/>
            <rect x="250" y="150" width="30" height="100" fill="#d6eaf8" id="liq-16"/>
            <line x1="200" y1="150" x2="350" y2="150" stroke="green" stroke-dasharray="4" stroke-width="2"/>
            <text x="360" y="155" fill="green" font-size="12">Stvarna H</text>
            <line id="line-read" x1="240" y1="130" x2="350" y2="130" stroke="red" stroke-width="2"/>
            <text id="txt-read" x="360" y="135" fill="red" font-size="12">Očitana</text>
            <line id="arrow-err" x1="265" y1="150" x2="265" y2="130" stroke="#e74c3c" />
            <text id="lbl-err" x="275" y="140" fill="#e74c3c" font-size="12">h</text>
        </svg>
    </div>
    
    <script>
        (function() {
            const slDc = document.getElementById('slider-dc16');
            const slRho = document.getElementById('slider-rho16');

            function update() {
                const dc_mm = parseFloat(slDc.value);
                const rho = parseFloat(slRho.value);
                const dc = dc_mm / 1000;
                const sig = 0.073; const g = 9.81;
                const h = (4 * sig) / (rho * g * dc) * 1000; 

                document.getElementById('val-dc16').textContent = dc_mm.toFixed(1);
                document.getElementById('val-rho16').textContent = rho;
                document.getElementById('out-h16').textContent = h.toFixed(2);
                const err = (h / 100) * 100;
                document.getElementById('out-err16').textContent = err.toFixed(1);

                const scale = 5; 
                const hPx = h * scale;
                const tubeW = dc_mm * 10; 
                
                document.getElementById('tube-16').setAttribute('width', tubeW);
                document.getElementById('liq-16').setAttribute('width', tubeW);
                document.getElementById('liq-16').setAttribute('y', 150 - hPx);
                document.getElementById('liq-16').setAttribute('height', 100 + hPx);

                document.getElementById('line-read').setAttribute('y1', 150 - hPx);
                document.getElementById('line-read').setAttribute('y2', 150 - hPx);
                document.getElementById('txt-read').setAttribute('y', 150 - hPx + 5);

                document.getElementById('arrow-err').setAttribute('y1', 150);
                document.getElementById('arrow-err').setAttribute('y2', 150 - hPx);
            }
            slDc.addEventListener('input', update);
            slRho.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 17

17. Cijev promjera $0,75\text{[mm]}$ uronjena je u kerozin temperature $20\text{[°C]}$. Kut kvašenja između kerozina i staklene površine iznosi $26^\circ$. Potrebno je odrediti kapilarni porast kerozina u cijevi. Okolni tlak oko kerozina je atmosferski, gustoća kerozina pri $20\text{[°C]}$ iznosi $820 \text{ [kg/m³]}$, dok površinska napetost kerozina iznosi $0,028 \text{ [N/m]}$. Potrebno je odrediti promjer cijevi za koju će pogreška u očitanju zbog površinske napetosti iznositi $1 \text{ [mm]}$.

**Zadano:** $t_k=20^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,00075\text{ m}, \sigma_{k20}=0,028\text{ N/m}, \rho_{k20}=820\text{ kg/m}^3, \theta=26^\circ, \Delta h=0,001\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $h=?, d_c \text{ za grešku 1mm}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$h = \frac{2 \sigma \cos\theta}{\rho g R_c} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,028 \cdot \cos 26^\circ}{820 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,000375} = \mathbf{16,7 \text{ mm}}$.

***

### Zadatak 18

18. Voda sa otopljenim hranjivim tvarima prenosi se u gornje dijelove biljke pomoću sitnih cjevčica djelomično kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Potrebno je odrediti do koje visine će se podignuti otopina vode i hranjivih tvari ukoliko je promjer cjevčica $0,005\text{[mm]}$ kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Otopinu aproksimirati svojajtivima vode pri temperaturi $20\text{[°C]}$, pri čemu je kut kvašenja $15^\circ$.

**Zadano:** $t_k=20^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,000005\text{ m}, \sigma_{v20}=0,073\text{ N/m}, \theta=15^\circ, \rho_{v20}=998,2\text{ kg/m}^3$
**Odrediti:** $h=?$

**Rješenje:**
$h = \frac{2 \cdot 0,073 \cdot \cos 15^\circ}{998,2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0000025} = \mathbf{5,76 \text{ m}}$.
*Napomena:* Visoka stabla (npr. sekvoje) koriste i osmotski tlak jer kapilarni efekt sam po sebi nije dovoljan za 100 m.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 18: Kapilarni porast u biljkama -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-18">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Kapilarnost u biljkama (Xilem)</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Promjer kapilare d: <span id="val-d18">0.05</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-d18" min="0.001" max="0.1" value="0.05" step="0.001">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Visina stabla H: <span id="val-h18">10</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-h18" min="1" max="100" value="10">
        </div>
        <button class="btn" id="btn-sequoia">🌲 Sekvoja 100m</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">MAX KAPILARNI DOMET</span><span id="out-hcap18">0.00</span> m</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">STATUS</span><span id="out-status18">OK</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="canvas-18" width="400" height="300"></canvas>
    </div>
    
    <script>
        (function() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-18');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            const slD = document.getElementById('slider-d18');
            const slH = document.getElementById('slider-h18');
            const btnSeq = document.getElementById('btn-sequoia');

            function update() {
                const d_mm = parseFloat(slD.value);
                const H_tree = parseFloat(slH.value);
                const d = d_mm / 1000;
                const h_cap = (4 * 0.073) / (1000 * 9.81 * d); 

                document.getElementById('val-d18').textContent = d_mm.toFixed(3);
                document.getElementById('val-h18').textContent = H_tree;
                document.getElementById('out-hcap18').textContent = h_cap.toFixed(2);
                
                const status = document.getElementById('out-status18');
                if (h_cap >= H_tree) {
                    status.textContent = "Dostiže vrh ✓";
                    status.style.color = "#27ae60";
                } else {
                    status.textContent = "Nedovoljno (treba osmoza) ✗";
                    status.style.color = "#e74c3c";
                }
                draw(h_cap, H_tree);
            }

            function draw(h_cap, H_tree) {
                ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width, canvas.height);
                const cx = canvas.width/2;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#8e44ad'; ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(cx-20, 300); ctx.lineTo(cx-10, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx+10, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx+20, 300); ctx.fill();
                ctx.fillStyle = '#27ae60'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, 50, 40, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();

                const pxPerMeter = 250 / Math.max(H_tree, h_cap, 10);
                const risePx = Math.min(h_cap, H_tree * 1.2) * pxPerMeter; 
                ctx.fillStyle = '#3498db'; ctx.fillRect(cx-5, 300 - risePx, 10, risePx);
                
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#e74c3c'; ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(cx-50, 300 - h_cap*pxPerMeter); ctx.lineTo(cx+50, 300 - h_cap*pxPerMeter); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.setLineDash([]);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#333'; ctx.fillText(`Max domet: ${h_cap.toFixed(1)}m`, cx+55, 300 - h_cap*pxPerMeter);
            }

            btnSeq.addEventListener('click', () => {
                slH.value = 100;
                const d_req = (4 * 0.073) / (1000 * 9.81 * 100) * 1000; 
                slD.value = 0.001;
                alert(`Za 100m visine samom kapilarnošću, promjer bi morao biti ~${(d_req*1000).toFixed(2)} mikrometara! To je premalo za efikasan transport.`);
                update();
            });

            slD.addEventListener('input', update);
            slH.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 19

19. Sustav na slici nalazi se na temperaturi $20\text{[°C]}$. Ukoliko atmosferski tlak iznosi $101,03 \text{ [kPa]}$, a apsolutni tlak na dnu spremnika iznosi $217,7 \text{ [kPa]}$, potrebno je odrediti relativnu gustoću maslinovog ulja. Relativna gustoća ulja SAE 30 za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $0,89$, dok relativna gustoća žive za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $13,6$.

**Zadano:** $t_1=20^\circ\text{C}, p_{atm}=101030\text{ Pa}, p_d=217700\text{ Pa}, \bar{\rho}_{SAE30\_20}=0,89, \bar{\rho}_{Hg20}=13,6, h_{SAE}=0,4\text{ m}, h_u=2,9\text{ m}, h_v=2,5\text{ m}, h_{SEA}=1,5\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $\bar{\rho}_{u20}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$p_{dno} = p_{atm} + \rho_v g (\bar{\rho}_{SAE}h_{SAE} + \bar{\rho}_u h_u + 1 \cdot h_v + \bar{\rho}_{Hg}h_{Hg})$
Uvrštavanjem: $217700 = 101030 + 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot (0,89 \cdot 1,5 + \bar{\rho}_u \cdot 2,9 + 1 \cdot 2,5 + 13,6 \cdot 0,4)$
Rješavanjem po $\bar{\rho}_u$ dobivamo: $\mathbf{\bar{\rho}_u = 0,911}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 19: Višeslojna tekućina (Manometar gustoće) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-19">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Tlak u višeslojnom spremniku</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Visina SAE Ulja: <span id="val-h1-19">2</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-h1-19" min="0" max="5" value="2" step="0.5">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Visina Vode: <span id="val-h2-19">2</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-h2-19" min="0" max="5" value="2" step="0.5">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Gustoća Ulja: <span id="val-rho-19">900</span> kg/m³</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-rho-19" min="800" max="1100" value="900" step="10">
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">TLAK NA DNU</span><span id="out-p-bottom">0</span> Pa</div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="canvas-19" width="500" height="300"></canvas>
    </div>

    <script>
        (function() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-19');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            const slH1 = document.getElementById('slider-h1-19');
            const slH2 = document.getElementById('slider-h2-19');
            const slRho = document.getElementById('slider-rho-19');

            function update() {
                const h1 = parseFloat(slH1.value); 
                const h2 = parseFloat(slH2.value); 
                const rho1 = parseFloat(slRho.value);
                const rho2 = 1000; const g = 9.81;
                const p1 = rho1 * g * h1;
                const p2 = p1 + rho2 * g * h2;
                
                document.getElementById('val-h1-19').textContent = h1;
                document.getElementById('val-h2-19').textContent = h2;
                document.getElementById('val-rho-19').textContent = rho1;
                document.getElementById('out-p-bottom').textContent = Math.round(p2);

                ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width, canvas.height);
                const w = 200; const baseX = 50; const baseY = 280; const scaleY = 20; 

                ctx.fillStyle = '#3498db'; ctx.fillRect(baseX, baseY - h2*scaleY, w, h2*scaleY);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#f1c40f'; ctx.fillRect(baseX, baseY - (h2+h1)*scaleY, w, h1*scaleY);

                const graphX = 300;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#333';
                ctx.moveTo(graphX, 20); ctx.lineTo(graphX, 280); ctx.moveTo(graphX, 280); ctx.lineTo(graphX+150, 280); ctx.stroke();

                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = 'red'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.moveTo(graphX, baseY - (h2+h1)*scaleY); 
                const p1_scaled = p1 / 200; ctx.lineTo(graphX + p1_scaled, baseY - h2*scaleY);
                const p2_scaled = p2 / 200; ctx.lineTo(graphX + p2_scaled, baseY); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.fillStyle = '#000'; ctx.fillText('p(z)', graphX+10, 20);
            }
            slH1.addEventListener('input', update);
            slH2.addEventListener('input', update);
            slRho.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 20: Intravenozna infuzija

**Tekst zadatka:** 
20. Intravenozna infuzija obično se vrši gravitacijski ovješenjem spremnika tekućine na dovoljnoj visini koja će nadvladati tlak krvi unutar krvnih žila te potisnuti fluid unutar tijela. Gustoća tekućine iznosi $\rho_i = 1020 \, [kg/m^3]$.
a) Potrebno je odrediti pretlak krvi, $p_{k1} = ?$, kada je hidrostatski tlak tekućine izjednačen s visinom krvi. Spremnik je $h_{i1} = 1,2 \, [m]$ iznad mjesta primanja infuzije.
b) Odrediti visinu ovješenja, $h_{i2} = ?$, za dostatan protok ukoliko potreban pretlak treba iznositi $p_{k2} = 20000 \, [Pa]$.
c) U toku primanja infuzije osobi se poveća tlak na $180 \, [mmHg]$ potrebno je odrediti novu visinu, $h_{i3} = ?$, ovješenja za dostatan protok.

**Zadano:**
* $h_{i1} = 1,2 \, [m], p_{k2} = 20000 \, [Pa], \rho_i = 1020 \, [kg/m^3], p_{mmHg} = 180 \, [mmHg]$

**Odrediti:**
$p_{k1} = ?, h_{i2} = ?, h_{i3} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
a) $p_{k1} = \rho_i g h_{i1} = 1020 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,2 = \mathbf{12007,4 \, Pa} \approx \mathbf{12 \text{ kPa}}$.
b) $h_{i2} = \frac{p_{k2}}{\rho_i g} = \frac{20000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,0 \text{ m}}$.
c) $180 \text{ mmHg} = 180 \cdot 133,322 = 23998 \, Pa \approx 24 \, kPa \implies h_{i3} = \frac{24000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 20: IV Infuzija (Napredni simulator) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z20-v4" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">💉 Simulator IV Infuzije: Hidrostatska ravnoteža</h3></div>
    
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap:20px; margin-top:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina vrećice (h): <span id="h-val-z20">1.2</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider-z20" min="0.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width:100%;">
            
            <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:8px;">Krvni tlak: <span id="bp-val-z20">120</span> mmHg</label>
            <input type="range" id="bp-slider-z20" min="60" max="200" step="5" value="120" style="width:100%;">

            <div style="margin-top:20px; padding:12px; background:#fff; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#64748b; font-weight:bold;">TLAKOVI:</div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-top:5px;">
                    <span style="color:#3182ce;">Infuzija (pH)</span>
                    <span id="ph-val-z20">...</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
                    <span style="color:#e53e3e;">Krv (pk)</span>
                    <span id="pk-val-z20">...</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="visual-panel" style="position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px; height:350px; overflow:hidden;">
            <canvas id="canvas-z20-v4" width="500" height="350" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="flow-status-z20" style="position:absolute; top:15px; right:15px; font-weight:bold; padding:5px 12px; border-radius:20px;">...</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z20-v4');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const hSl = document.getElementById('h-slider-z20');
        const bpSl = document.getElementById('bp-slider-z20');
        const statusEl = document.getElementById('flow-status-z20');

        function draw() {
            const h = parseFloat(hSl.value);
            const bp_mmHg = parseFloat(bpSl.value);
            const pk = bp_mmHg * 133.322;
            const ph = 1020 * 9.81 * h;
            const canFlow = ph > pk;

            document.getElementById('h-val-z20').textContent = h.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('bp-val-z20').textContent = bp_mmHg;
            document.getElementById('ph-val-z20').textContent = Math.round(ph) + " Pa";
            document.getElementById('pk-val-z20').textContent = Math.round(pk) + " Pa";

            statusEl.textContent = canFlow ? "PROTOK OK ✓" : "POVRAT KRVI! ✗";
            statusEl.style.backgroundColor = canFlow ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5";
            statusEl.style.color = canFlow ? "#27ae60" : "#e53e3e";

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 250, cy_arm = 280;
            const h_scale = 70; // px per meter

            // Patient Arm (Simplified)
            ctx.fillStyle = "#fbd38d";
            ctx.fillRect(50, cy_arm, 400, 30);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, cy_arm+15); ctx.lineTo(450, cy_arm+15); ctx.stroke(); // Vein

            // IV Bag
            const bagY = cy_arm - h * h_scale;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf8ff"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(cx - 30, bagY - 60, 60, 80, 10); ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
            
            // IV Line
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#a0aec0"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx, bagY + 20); ctx.lineTo(cx, cy_arm + 15); ctx.stroke();

            // Particles flow
            if (canFlow) {
                const speed = (ph - pk) / 5000;
                const offset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * speed * 50) % 40;
                ctx.fillStyle = "#3182ce";
                for(let i=0; i<5; i++) {
                    const py = bagY + 40 + i*40 + offset;
                    if (py < cy_arm + 15) {
                        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, py, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // Reverse flow (blood in line)
                ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
                const offset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * 20) % 40;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy_arm - 10 - offset, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            }
        }
        setInterval(draw, 30);
        hSl.oninput = bpSl.oninput = draw;
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 21: Utjecaj težine zraka

**Tekst zadatka:** 
21. Zatvoreni spremnik sa slike temperature je 20[°C]. Apsolutni tlak u točki A iznosi 98 [kPa]. Gustoća zraka pri 20 [°C] iznosi $\rho_z = 1,2041 \, [kg/m^3]$ (Kraut).
a) Potrebno je odrediti apsolutni tlak u točki B.
b) Potrebno je odrediti pogrešku uzrokovanu zanemarivanjem utjecaja specifične težine zraka.

**Zadano:**
* $t = 20[°C], p_A = 98000 \, [Pa], \rho_{z20} = 1,2041 \, [kg/m^3], h_{zA} = 5 \, [m], h_{vA} = 3 \, [m]$
* $h_{zB} = 3 \, [m], h_{vB} = 5 \, [m], \rho_{v20} = 998 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
$p_B = ?, \Delta p_{err} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
a) Postavljanjem jednadžbe od A do B preko zraka i vode:
$p_B = p_A + \rho_z g (h_{zA} - h_{zB}) - \rho_v g (h_{vB} - h_{vA})$
$p_B = 98000 + 1,2041 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = \mathbf{78443,2 \text{ Pa}}$.
b) Bez utjecaja zraka: $p_B = p_A - \rho_v g \Delta h_v = 98000 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = 78419,6 \text{ Pa}$.
Pogreška $\Delta p_{err} = 78443,2 - 78419,6 = 23,6 \, Pa \approx \mathbf{0,03\%}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 21: Zatvoreni spremnik -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-21">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Utjecaj težine zraka na tlak</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Tlak pA: <span id="val-pa21">100</span> kPa</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-pa21" min="80" max="120" value="100">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Visina vode Δhv: <span id="val-hv21">5</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-hv21" min="1" max="10" value="5">
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">TLAK pB (točan)</span><span id="out-pb21">0</span> Pa</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">GREŠKA (bez zraka)</span><span id="out-err21">0.00</span> %</div>
    </div>

    <script>
        (function() {
            const slPa = document.getElementById('slider-pa21');
            const slHv = document.getElementById('slider-hv21');

            function update() {
                const pA = parseFloat(slPa.value) * 1000;
                const hv = parseFloat(slHv.value);
                const rho_z = 1.2; const rho_v = 1000; const g = 9.81;
                
                const pB_exact = pA + rho_z * g * hv - rho_v * g * hv;
                const pB_approx = pA - rho_v * g * hv;
                const err = Math.abs((pB_exact - pB_approx) / pB_exact) * 100;

                document.getElementById('val-pa21').textContent = slPa.value;
                document.getElementById('val-hv21').textContent = hv;
                document.getElementById('out-pb21').textContent = Math.round(pB_exact);
                document.getElementById('out-err21').textContent = err.toFixed(4);
            }
            slPa.addEventListener('input', update);
            slHv.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Zadatak 22: Manometar na planini

**Tekst zadatka:** 
22. Voda u spremniku predtlačena je zrakom, pri čemu se tlak očitava pomoću višefluidnog manometra kao što je prikazano na slici. Spremnik se nalazi na planini nadmorske visine 1400[m] pri čemu atmosferski tlak iznosi 85,6 [kPa]. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1}$. Zadano h1 =0,1 [m], h2 =0,2 [m], h3 =0,46 [m], ulja 850 [kg/m3] te žive 13600 [kg/m3]. Pretpostaviti jednoliku raspodjelu tlaka zraka po visini u spremniku, budući da je gustoća zraka relativno niska spram ostalih medija.

**Zadano:**
* $h = 1400[m], p_{atm} = 85600 \, [Pa], h_1 = 0,1 \, [m], h_2 = 0,2 \, [m], h_3 = 0,46 \, [m]$
* $\rho_v = 1000 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_u = 850 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_{Hg} = 13600 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
Pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
Tlak zraka u spremniku je jednoliko raspoređen. Postavljanjem jednadžbe manometra:
$p_1 + \rho_v g h_1 + \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_{Hg} g h_3 = p_{atm}$
$p_1 - p_{atm} = \rho_{Hg} g h_3 - \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_v g h_2$
$p_{m1} = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,46 - 850 \cdot 0,2 - 1000 \cdot 0,1) = \mathbf{58723 \, [Pa]} \approx \mathbf{58,7 \text{ kPa}}$.
Apsolutni tlak u posudi iznosi: $p_1 = p_{m1} + p_{atm} = 58723 + 85600 = \mathbf{144,3 \text{ kPa}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 22: Višefluidni manometar -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-22">
    <style>
        #widget-22 .controls {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 15px;
        }
        #widget-22 .metrics {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: space-around;
            gap: 10px;
        }
    </style>
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Manometar i nadmorska visina</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Nadmorska visina: <span id="val-alt22">0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-alt22" min="0" max="3000" value="0" step="100">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Visina žive h3: <span id="val-h3-22">460</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-h3-22" min="100" max="1000" value="460" step="10">
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">p_atm</span><span id="out-patm22">0</span> kPa</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">p_apsolutni</span><span id="out-pabs22">0</span> kPa</div>
    </div>

    <script>
        (function() {
            const slAlt = document.getElementById('slider-alt22');
            const slH3 = document.getElementById('slider-h3-22');

            function update() {
                const alt = parseFloat(slAlt.value);
                const h3 = parseFloat(slH3.value) / 1000;
                
                const p_atm = 101.3 * Math.exp(-alt / 8000); // approx
                const p_gauge = (13600 * 9.81 * h3 - 1000 * 9.81 * 0.1 - 850 * 9.81 * 0.2) / 1000;
                const p_abs = p_atm + p_gauge;

                document.getElementById('val-alt22').textContent = alt;
                document.getElementById('val-h3-22').textContent = Math.round(h3*1000);
                document.getElementById('out-patm22').textContent = p_atm.toFixed(1);
                document.getElementById('out-pabs22').textContent = p_abs.toFixed(1);
            }
            slAlt.addEventListener('input', update);
            slH3.addEventListener('input', update);
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

## Bonus interaktivni sadržaj

### Bonus 1: Utrka viskoznosti (Stokesov zakon)

U ovom widgetu možete vidjeti kako se terminalna brzina pada kuglice mijenja ovisno o viskoznosti fluida i gustoći materijala. Prema Stokesovom zakonu, sila otpora je $F_d = 6 \pi \mu R v$.

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 1: Redizajnirana Utrka Viskoznosti -->
<div class="widget-container" id="bonus-1-v2">
    <style>
        #bonus-1-v2 .race-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; }
        #bonus-1-v2 .race-canvas-container { position: relative; background: #2c3e50; border-radius: 8px; height: 450px; overflow: hidden; }
        #bonus-1-v2 .chart-container { background: #fff; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 10px; height: 450px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        #bonus-1-v2 .lane-label { position: absolute; top: 10px; width: 60px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.6rem; color: #fff; font-weight: bold; writing-mode: vertical-rl; }
        #bonus-1-v2 canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto !important; }
        #bonus-1-v2 .controls { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; }
        #bonus-1-v2 .control-group { flex: 1; min-width: 200px; }
    </style>

    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Eksperiment: Terminalna brzina (Stokes)</h3></div>
    
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Materijal kuglice:</label>
            <select id="mat-select" style="padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px;">
                <option value="7800">Čelik (7800 kg/m³)</option>
                <option value="2700">Aluminij (2700 kg/m³)</option>
                <option value="1200">Plastika (1200 kg/m³)</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <button class="btn" id="btn-race-v2" style="width: 100%;">🏁 POKRENI EKSPERIMENT</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="race-layout">
        <div class="race-canvas-container">
            <canvas id="canvas-race-v2" width="400" height="450"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-container">
            <div style="font-weight: bold; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; text-align: center;">v(t) - Graf brzine</div>
            <canvas id="canvas-chart-v2" width="200" height="400"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cRace = document.getElementById('canvas-race-v2');
        const cChart = document.getElementById('canvas-chart-v2');
        const ctxR = cRace.getContext('2d');
        const ctxC = cChart.getContext('2d');
        const btn = document.getElementById('btn-race-v2');
        const matSel = document.getElementById('mat-select');

        const fluids = [
            { name: 'Voda', mu: 0.001, color: '#3498db' },
            { name: 'Ulje', mu: 0.05, color: '#f1c40f' },
            { name: 'Glicerin', mu: 1.0, color: '#95a5a6' },
            { name: 'Med', mu: 5.0, color: '#e67e22' }
        ];

        let balls = [];
        let history = []; // for graph
        let animId = null;
        let startTime = 0;

        function init() {
            const rho_s = parseFloat(matSel.value);
            balls = fluids.map((f, i) => ({
```
