```{=html}
                x: 50 + i * 100,
                y: 30,
                v: 0,
                fluid: f,
                rho: rho_s,
                r: 0.005, // 5mm
                history: [],
                finished: false
            }));
            history = [];
            draw();
        }

        function draw() {
            ctxR.clearRect(0,0,cRace.width, cRace.height);
            fluids.forEach((f, i) => {
                ctxR.fillStyle = f.color;
                ctxR.globalAlpha = 0.2;
                ctxR.fillRect(i*100, 0, 100, 450);
                ctxR.globalAlpha = 1.0;
                ctxR.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';
                ctxR.font = '10px Arial';
                ctxR.fillText(f.name, i*100 + 30, 440);
            });

            balls.forEach(b => {
                ctxR.shadowBlur = 10; ctxR.shadowColor = 'black';
                ctxR.fillStyle = b.rho > 3000 ? '#7f8c8d' : (b.rho > 2000 ? '#bdc3c7' : '#ecf0f1');
                ctxR.beginPath(); ctxR.arc(b.x, b.y, 10, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                ctxR.shadowBlur = 0;
            });

            // Draw Chart
            ctxC.clearRect(0,0,cChart.width, cChart.height);
            ctxC.strokeStyle = '#eee';
            for(let i=0; i<10; i++) {
                ctxC.beginPath(); ctxC.moveTo(0, i*40); ctxC.lineTo(cChart.width, i*40); ctxC.stroke();
            }
            
            balls.forEach((b, idx) => {
                if(b.history.length < 2) return;
                ctxC.strokeStyle = b.fluid.color;
                ctxC.lineWidth = 2;
                ctxC.beginPath();
                ctxC.moveTo(0, 400 - b.history[0]*200);
                b.history.forEach((v, t) => {
                    ctxC.lineTo(t * 2, 400 - v * 200);
                });
                ctxC.stroke();
            });
        }

        function loop() {
            const g = 9.81;
            const rho_f = 1000;
            let stillMoving = false;

            balls.forEach(b => {
                if(b.y < 420) {
                    stillMoving = true;
                    // Stokes Terminal Velocity v = 2/9 * r^2 * g * (rho_s - rho_f) / mu
                    const vt = (2/9) * Math.pow(b.r, 2) * g * (b.rho - rho_f) / b.fluid.mu;
                    
                    // Acceleration (approximate approach to vt)
                    const acc = (vt - b.v) * 0.1;
                    b.v += acc;
                    b.y += b.v * 50; 
                    if(b.history.length < 100) b.history.push(b.v);
                }
            });

            draw();
            if(stillMoving) animId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
        }

        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if(animId) cancelAnimationFrame(animId);
            init();
            loop();
        });

        init();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### Bonus 2: Nenjutnovski Fluidi

Razlika između Newtonskih fluida (viskoznost konstantna), shear-thinning (viskoznost pada s brzinom smicanja) i shear-thickening (viskoznost raste).

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 2: Non-Newtonian Fluids -->
<div class="widget-container" id="bonus-2">
    <style>
        #bonus-2 .controls { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; }
        #bonus-2 .control-group { flex: 1; min-width: 200px; }
        #bonus-2 canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto !important; }
    </style>
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Nenjutnovski Fluidi (Shear thinning/thickening)</h3></div>
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Brzina smicanja (Shear Rate):</label>
            <input type="range" id="slider-shear" min="0" max="100" value="50">
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
            <button class="btn" id="btn-newton">Newtonski</button>
            <button class="btn" id="btn-thin">Shear-Thinning (Kečap)</button>
            <button class="btn" id="btn-thick">Shear-Thickening (Oobleck)</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="canvas-rheo" width="600" height="300"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="metrics"><div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">RELATIVNA VISKOZNOST</span><span id="out-visc">1.00</span></div></div>

    <script>
        (function() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-rheo');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            const slShear = document.getElementById('slider-shear');
            let type = 'newton'; let particles = [];
            for(let i=0; i<50; i++) particles.push({x: Math.random()*600, y: Math.random()*300, angle: Math.random()*Math.PI*2});

            function update() {
                const shear = parseFloat(slShear.value);
                ctx.clearRect(0,0,600,300);
                let mu = 1;
                if(type === 'newton') mu = 5;
                if(type === 'thin') mu = 100 / (shear + 10);
                if(type === 'thick') mu = 0.1 * (shear + 1);
                document.getElementById('out-visc').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);

                particles.forEach(p => {
                    const u = (shear/10) * (1 - p.y/300) * 10; 
                    p.x += u; if(p.x > 600) p.x = 0;
                    ctx.save(); ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
                    if(type === 'thin') p.angle += (0 - p.angle) * 0.1 * (shear/100);
                    else if (type === 'thick') p.angle += (Math.random()-0.5) * (shear/50);
                    ctx.rotate(p.angle);
                    ctx.fillStyle = type==='thick' ? '#8e44ad' : (type==='thin'?'#c0392b':'#3498db');
                    if(type==='thick' && shear > 50) ctx.fillRect(-5,-5, 10,10);
                    else if (type==='thin') ctx.fillRect(-10, -2, 20, 4);
                    else { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); }
                    ctx.restore();
                });
                requestAnimationFrame(update);
            }
            document.getElementById('btn-newton').addEventListener('click', ()=>{type='newton';});
            document.getElementById('btn-thin').addEventListener('click', ()=>{type='thin';});
            document.getElementById('btn-thick').addEventListener('click', ()=>{type='thick';});
            update();
        })();
    </script>
</div>

```
